summary: Make the hosted M4 journey locate History through its real activity-pending accessible name instead of waiting on an impossible exact label.

externalInputs.purpose: Inspect the exact-head retained M4 failure, page accessibility snapshot, and trace location after all preceding Ubuntu browser checks passed.

decisions.decision: Locate the History activity-rail button by the complete allowed accessible names 'History' or 'History, activity pending' instead of requiring only exact 'History'.
decisions.rationale: The agent proposal intentionally raises the activity-pending state immediately before the journey opens History. The retained accessibility snapshot proves the product correctly exposed that state in the button name; the old locator waited for a label that could not exist until the pending work was reviewed. Accepting only the base name plus the documented pending suffix preserves semantic role/name selection without weakening the product assertion.

testEvidence.criterion: The stateful journey must open the History control whether or not its documented pending-activity suffix is present, while rejecting the obsolete exact-base-name locator.
testEvidence.test: Pin the exact semantic locator in the hosted-config structural contract, observe it fail against the retained exact-name source, then replace the one journey locator.

red.outcome: RED: 1 file and 1 test failed because the journey still required exact 'History'. Hosted job 88281157042 independently failed after eight minutes while its page snapshot exposed 'History, activity pending'.

green.outcome: GREEN locally: the focused file and its 1 structural test passed in 796 ms. Exact hosted journey confirmation remains required.

nearMisses.sought: A larger timeout or product-label workaround
nearMisses.confirmation: Rejected. The retained snapshot proves the button was present under its correct stateful accessible name. The repair changes one semantic locator and does not increase the eight-minute outer bound, add retries, remove an assertion, or change product UI behavior.

questions: No owner decision is required. Exact hosted M4 confirmation remains pending.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
